overall.description: Cinematic third-person gameplay footage from a video game showing a tribal warrior character standing on a rocky cliff edge overlooking a waterfall and river canyon. The camera slowly pans to reveal the lush natural environment and distant ruins as the character surveys the landscape.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky cliff edge at waterfall overlook

agents.ego_description: standing motionless on a rocky outcrop, looking down at the waterfall and pool below

entered.detail: large reddish-brown rock formation where the character stands at the cliff edge
rushing white water falling into the pool below with heavy mist
deep turquoise water pool at the base of the falls
white mist rising from the waterfall impact creating atmospheric haze
steep rocky cliff with sparse green vegetation
steep rocky cliff face with patches of moss and small plants

segments.scene_description: The character stands on a rocky outcrop at the edge of a waterfall, looking down into a misty pool below. The camera focuses on the rushing water and steep cliff faces surrounding the falls, with warm sunlight illuminating the scene.

scene_state.functional_zone: expansive river canyon with ancient ruins

events.description: camera pans upward from the waterfall to reveal the wider river canyon and distant landscape

agents.ego_description: slowly turning to survey the expansive canyon, revealing the river flowing through the valley and distant structures

entered.detail: winding river flowing away through the canyon valley
dense green foliage and trees covering the canyon walls
dense green foliage and trees covering the canyon walls
distant stone structures or bridges spanning the canyon in the background
faint blue luminescent light emanating from the left cliff face

segments.scene_description: As the camera pans upward, the view opens to reveal a vast river canyon with lush vegetation covering the walls. The river flows away into the distance toward ancient ruins, while a mysterious blue glow appears on the left cliff face, suggesting technological elements in the natural landscape.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that begins with an intimate view of a waterfall and expands into a sweeping vista of a mystical river canyon. It begins focused on a tribal warrior standing atop a rocky outcrop, looking down into a misty pool where rushing water and steep cliff faces are bathed in warm sunlight. As the camera pans upward, the perspective opens to reveal a vast canyon with lush vegetation clinging to the walls. The view then shifts to follow the river as it flows toward distant ancient ruins, while a mysterious blue glow emerges on the left cliff face to blend technological elements into the natural landscape.
